mapper.select: SELECT memo_id, recipe_video_id, user_id, content, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt FROM recipe_memo WHERE recipe_video_id = #{recipeVideoId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe_memo (recipe_video_id, user_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{recipeVideoId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT memo_id, recipe_video_id, user_id, content, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt FROM recipe_memo WHERE memo_id = #{memoId}
